name: Multimarket Translations
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure translations for search interface elements and merchandising content across different language markets, ensuring customers experience search and filtering in their native language."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This localization capability helps provide culturally appropriate shopping experiences that improve usability and conversion for international customers, while maintaining AI-powered personalization that adapts to regional shopping behaviors and preferences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing multimarket translations helps deliver professional localized experiences without duplicating configuration effort. You can manage translations for UI elements, facet labels, messaging, and other interface components centrally-enabling consistent brand voice across markets while respecting language differences that influence customer trust and purchase decisions, supporting global expansion with localized experiences that maintain the personalization driving conversion."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLKJQHJ01DB7/8beed66ba13f87d43ba057a715ed32a6b633be2218c396d8eddff1e09c5422f5-picture-2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLKJQHJ01DB7/8beed66ba13f87d43ba057a715ed32a6b633be2218c396d8eddff1e09c5422f5-picture-2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "8beed66ba13f87d43ba057a715ed32a6b633be2218c396d8eddff1e09c5422f5-picture-2.png", "width": 4400, "height": 1604}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How Do I Manage Translations?"}], "data-id": "how-do-i-manage-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To support multimarket operations, we provide four main types of translations:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Static Translations", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Dynamic Translations", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product Data Translations", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Collection Data Translations", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Static Translations", "bold": true}], "data-id": "1-static-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Static translations are rendered through our Liquid framework. They are managed within Shopify's built-in functionality."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Z8Q7JIBFXDT2/8e6bf05a84273fa0d819a2a2e0891c8d1a4a26f8ea24696c3318d6575e49d7d0-image-21-1-1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Z8Q7JIBFXDT2/8e6bf05a84273fa0d819a2a2e0891c8d1a4a26f8ea24696c3318d6575e49d7d0-image-21-1-1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "8e6bf05a84273fa0d819a2a2e0891c8d1a4a26f8ea24696c3318d6575e49d7d0-image_21_1_1.png", "width": 1055, "height": 804}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Example Uses:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Text in headers, buttons, or labels."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Management:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Shopify's translation interface."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IN4YJU9BRKYA/5f75778097930c59e54a1bcbb9e14deca82883dc662db70f340b4753b8eac92a-screenshot-2024-11-19-225355.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/IN4YJU9BRKYA/5f75778097930c59e54a1bcbb9e14deca82883dc662db70f340b4753b8eac92a-screenshot-2024-11-19-225355.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "5f75778097930c59e54a1bcbb9e14deca82883dc662db70f340b4753b8eac92a-Screenshot_2024-11-19_225355.png", "width": 1878, "height": 889}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This function is also useful for single-market clients needing to alter default language settings. Consider documenting this feature as a standalone resource in Liquid.", "italic": true}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Dynamic Translations", "bold": true}], "data-id": "2-dynamic-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Dynamic translations cover items that may frequently change or vary by customer interaction, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter names"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/7L1T0Y8JBDQB/75d19317ec461dc9d227e12576cde1c52fa684c24e78af933c7fc05c3a5a4ea9-screenshot-2024-11-19-225154.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "3. Product Data Translations", "bold": true}], "data-id": "3-product-data-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product data translations are managed through Shopify's Localization App, syncing translated data into Merchandising Cloud on a scheduled or on-demand basis."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Management:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Shopify Localization App."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4Z634B9RFEM8/a55a76abf646b9c5c0663b0d235d3387181f43c76c050eeaccfd8f5af266814b-screenshot-2024-11-19-224936.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4Z634B9RFEM8/a55a76abf646b9c5c0663b0d235d3387181f43c76c050eeaccfd8f5af266814b-screenshot-2024-11-19-224936.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "a55a76abf646b9c5c0663b0d235d3387181f43c76c050eeaccfd8f5af266814b-Screenshot_2024-11-19_224936.png", "width": 1881, "height": 885}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Syncing:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Every 24 hours by default, with on-demand updates available. Once Shopify's webhooks support translations, this process will integrate seamlessly."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Shopify's product webhooks currently lack translation support, so updates follow a scheduled pattern.", "italic": true}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "4. Collection Data Translations", "bold": true}], "data-id": "4-collection-data-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Collection translations operate similarly to product translations and are also managed via Shopify's Localization App, syncing to Merchandising Cloud under the same schedule and on-demand options."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Management:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Shopify Localization App."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/D2DWTUPCAF2B/d3c47fab346739f5cac7c352247b66b4eb07511f77d9b88a4b1495a70e0e7261-screenshot-2024-11-19-224745.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/D2DWTUPCAF2B/d3c47fab346739f5cac7c352247b66b4eb07511f77d9b88a4b1495a70e0e7261-screenshot-2024-11-19-224745.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "d3c47fab346739f5cac7c352247b66b4eb07511f77d9b88a4b1495a70e0e7261-Screenshot_2024-11-19_224745.png", "width": 1905, "height": 854}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Syncing:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 24-hour default sync with on-demand updates."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Shopify's collection webhooks also lack translation support but will be updated once available.", "italic": true}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Translated Collection URLs are optional - merchants can blend translated and untranslated collections. In Merchandising Cloud, collections are treated as a unified entity, allowing merchandising actions by either aggregate or individual markets.", "italic": true}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Adding Translations for Custom Features"}], "data-id": "adding-translations-for-custom-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To manage translations for custom theme components within Merchandising Cloud, you can follow these steps:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Set Up the Findify-Related Locale Configuration"}], "data-id": "1-set-up-the-findify-related-locale-configuration"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Default locale files are named based on the default language of your store (e.g., "}, {"text": "locales/en.default.json", "code": true}, {"text": "). Refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/locales/storefront-locale-files#the-default-locale-file", "children": [{"text": "Shopify's documentation"}]}, {"text": " for details."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the theme code, locate the "}, {"text": "default locale JSON configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": " file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the file and navigate to the "}, {"text": "Findify configuration section", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Example: To add a \"Sale\" label, use the key "}, {"text": "custom.sale", "code": true}, {"text": ":"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1HHTWV1JFWWI/ed36a38a01d76c876611fe5b14472017bbf5d65ac55b3eb763ddfb34a66fa561-znyj3m.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1HHTWV1JFWWI/ed36a38a01d76c876611fe5b14472017bbf5d65ac55b3eb763ddfb34a66fa561-znyj3m.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ed36a38a01d76c876611fe5b14472017bbf5d65ac55b3eb763ddfb34a66fa561-znYJ3m.png", "width": 1263, "height": 867}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Use the Locale Configuration in Theme Code"}], "data-id": "2-use-the-locale-configuration-in-theme-code"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To reference your custom locale configuration in theme code, use the following format:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{{ 'findify.custom.sale' | t }}"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "{{ 'findify.some_custom_key.some_custom_subkey' | t }}"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "3. Add or Update Translations"}], "data-id": "3-add-or-update-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add translations for other languages:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", Verify Translations"}], "data-id": "4-verify-translations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After adding translations, verify that they appear correctly across all markets."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "English market example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X3TESKE3NCPW/ee2bfb11dd4c07a0480523eefdef4cd9937185275e91cabc075834401c18c873-ugaabu.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X3TESKE3NCPW/ee2bfb11dd4c07a0480523eefdef4cd9937185275e91cabc075834401c18c873-ugaabu.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "ee2bfb11dd4c07a0480523eefdef4cd9937185275e91cabc075834401c18c873-ugaABU.png", "width": 401, "height": 661}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "French market example:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\nThis documentation should provide an accessible overview of translation types and the processes for maintaining them within a multimarket environment.
